params.name: workspaceId
params.description: Optional workspace ID to filter folders by workspace.

items.docs: Retrieves the library folder structure, listing all folders available in the Gong library. Folders are used to organize curated call content for training and review. Can be filtered by workspace.

info.name: Gong List calls in a library folder

params.name: folderId
params.description: The unique identifier of the library folder.

items.docs: Retrieves a list of calls stored in a specific library folder. Returns call references that can be used to retrieve full call details via the Calls API.
